text: Two weeks later. The night before the Worm Moon.
You didn't plan to be in the school this late. Vermia texted an emergency meeting. The text read: 'EMERGENCY. DIRTUS HAS ESCALATED. Room 2-B. COME NOW. Scatha is watching.'
The hallway lights are on their night setting — half-power, slightly orange. The clubroom door is ajar. You can hear voices.

speaker: Grubwin
text: I'm just saying — the maintenance tunnel specifically says no unauthorized access.

speaker: Vermia
text: Scatha doesn't recognize the authority of the school board!

speaker: Grubwin
text: I do! I go here!
You push the door open. Dirtus is standing at the front of the room with his full foam-board presentation set up on the teacher's stand. He has added three new slides.

speaker: Dirtus
text: [player]. Good. You're here. Tonight is a rehearsal.

speaker: [player]
text: A rehearsal for what.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Tomorrow night is the Worm Moon. I have secured access to the maintenance tunnel. Slide eight details the chalk Scathagram dimensions. We need to practice the hymn in the space so the acoustics are right.

speaker: Grubwin
text: We are NOT going into the maintenance tunnel at night to practice for a worm summoning.

speaker: Dirtus
text: We're just rehearsing.

speaker: Grubwin
text: The rehearsal IS the trespassing.

speaker: Mawla
text: How did you secure access.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The janitor's key cabinet was unlocked.

speaker: Mawla
text: Dirtus.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I returned the key immediately after making a copy.

speaker: Grubwin
text: That's WORSE.

speaker: Vermia
text: Okay wait — everyone stop. [player], you've been here long enough. You get a vote. Tomorrow night: do we do the summoning or not?
Everyone looks at you.

options.label: We should do it. Worst case it doesn't work and it's a good story.
We shouldn't trespass. But maybe somewhere else?
This is a bad idea and I won't be part of it.
